title: Fex's Alphabet & More Mod
description: A mod adding latin letter, cyrillic letter and symbol blocks.
body:
FAMM is a Mod adding all (latin & cyrillic) Letter Blocks to Minecraft
and also some other things, like math signs/symbols or decorations.

YT Videos
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4MJv8lBw-eE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
